top_findings.title: CSV file loading not fully implemented
top_findings.evidence: src/data.rs load functions exist but TASK.md lists 6 required CSV files; code supports partial loading
top_findings.suggestion: Verify all 6 CSV files can be loaded from data/kaggle/ directory

top_findings.title: MCP server not started automatically
top_findings.evidence: src/main.rs:542 - main() function is minimal; no MCP protocol handshake visible
top_findings.suggestion: Implement full MCP server initialization and JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol handling

top_findings.title: Player data queries incomplete
top_findings.evidence: src/query.rs has match queries and team stats; player filtering methods less developed
top_findings.suggestion: Add comprehensive player filtering by nationality, club, and position as specified in TASK.md

top_findings.title: 5 clippy warnings prevent compilation with -D warnings
top_findings.suggestion: Use std::io::Error::other() instead of Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, ...); apply is_none_or and remove unnecessary borrows

top_findings.title: Cross-file queries not demonstrated
top_findings.evidence: No tests shown combining player + match data queries as per TASK.md:344
top_findings.suggestion: Add integration tests for cross-dataset analysis (e.g., players from winning teams)
